anime_pulse_items.title: One Piece Chapter 1132: Luffy vs. Imu Final Battle Begins!
anime_pulse_items.summary: The latest chapter drops massive lore bombs as Luffy confronts Imu in the Holy Land. Fans are freaking out over the reveal of the Ancient Weapon Uranus. With the series nearing its climax, this chapter has shattered Twitter records with 2 million mentions in 24 hours.

anime_pulse_items.title: Death Note 20th Anniversary: New Anime Project Announced!
anime_pulse_items.summary: To celebrate 20 years, Studio Madhouse reveals a new Death Note anime series featuring an original story set in the same universe. The teaser shows a new Death Note falling into the human world. Pre-orders for limited edition Death Note replicas sold out in 5 minutes.

anime_pulse_items.title: Naruto x Boruto: New Movie 'The Last Sage' Teaser Trailer
anime_pulse_items.summary: Pierrot drops a stunning trailer for the upcoming film featuring Naruto and Boruto facing a new Otsutsuki threat. The animation quality has fans comparing it to Demon Slayer: Mugen Train. Release date set for December 2026.

anime_pulse_items.title: Dragon Ball Daima Episode 18: Goku's Ultra Instinct Evolution Shocks Fans
anime_pulse_items.summary: In the latest Daima episode, Goku achieves a new form combining Ultra Instinct with his Demon Realm powers. The fight scene against the Demon King has become the most-tweeted anime moment of the week. Merch sales for the new form skyrocketed.

anime_pulse_items.title: Jujutsu Kaisen Season 3: Shibuya Incident Arc Finale Airs Today
anime_pulse_items.summary: The season finale of JJK season 3 features Gojo's return and a cliffhanger that has manga readers hyped. Animation by MAPPA is being called the best of the year. Crunchyroll reported 10 million viewers within the first hour.

anime_pulse_items.title: Demon Slayer: Infinity Castle Arc Movie Breaks Box Office Records in Japan
anime_pulse_items.summary: The first film of the Infinity Castle trilogy earns ¥5 billion in its opening weekend, surpassing previous records. Fans praise the adaptation of the final battle. International release dates are being expedited due to demand.

anime_pulse_items.title: Attack on Titan: The Final Chapters - Director's Cut Announced
anime_pulse_items.summary: MAPPA announces a director's cut of the final episodes with extended scenes and new music. The cut will be released in theaters worldwide in July 2026. Fans are debating the changes on Reddit.

anime_pulse_items.title: My Hero Academia Chapter 430: Final Battle Begins - Deku vs. All For One
anime_pulse_items.summary: The manga enters its final arc with Deku facing All For One in a climactic showdown. Horikoshi's art is praised. The chapter sold out in Japan within hours. Theories about Deku's ultimate sacrifice are trending.

anime_pulse_items.title: Chainsaw Man Season 2: New Trailer Reveals International Assassins Arc
anime_pulse_items.summary: MAPPA drops a bloody trailer for season 2 featuring Denji and the new characters. The trailer gains 10 million views in 12 hours. Release date set for July 2026. Fans are excited for the chaos.

anime_pulse_items.title: Spy x Family Season 3 Premiere Date Announced for June 2026
anime_pulse_items.summary: WIT Studio confirms season 3 will premiere on June 15, 2026, with a new mission arc. A new key visual shows the Forger family in a beach setting. Netflix secures streaming rights for select regions.

anime_pulse_items.title: Frieren: Beyond Journey's End Wins Anime of the Year at Crunchyroll Awards
anime_pulse_items.summary: Frieren sweeps the Crunchyroll Anime Awards with 8 wins including Best Anime, Best Director, and Best Score. Season 2 officially greenlit with a teaser. The series' emotional depth has resonated globally.

anime_pulse_items.title: Solo Leveling Season 2: Jeju Island Arc Premieres with 12 Episodes
anime_pulse_items.summary: A-1 Pictures releases season 2 covering the Jeju Island raid. The animation quality is praised, especially the fight scenes. Comparisons to the manhwa are trending on Twitter. Episode 1 breaks Crunchyroll records.

anime_pulse_items.title: Netflix Announces Live-Action One Piece Season 2 Cast: Baroque Works Revealed
anime_pulse_items.summary: Netflix reveals the cast for Baroque Works agents including Mr. 0 and Miss All Sunday. Fans are excited about the casting choices. Filming begins in May 2026. The first season's success has set high expectations.

anime_pulse_items.title: Crunchyroll Adds 10 New Anime Simulcasts for Spring 2026 Season
anime_pulse_items.summary: Crunchyroll expands its Spring 2026 lineup with titles like 'Kaiju No. 8' season 2 and 'Oshi no Ko' season 2. The platform now offers over 50 simulcasts. Pricing remains unchanged despite the increase.

anime_pulse_items.title: Reddit's r/anime Explodes with 'Best Anime of 2026 So Far' Poll
anime_pulse_items.summary: The subreddit's mid-year poll sees over 500k votes with Frieren leading, followed by Jujutsu Kaisen and Solo Leveling. The thread has 10k comments. Drama ensues over vote manipulation accusations.

anime_pulse_items.title: Death Note: New Manga One-Shot 'L's Successor' Released
anime_pulse_items.summary: Shueisha releases a one-shot manga featuring a new character who inherits L's legacy. The story is set 10 years after the original. Fans are divided on whether it captures the original's magic. Digital sales crash the site.

anime_pulse_items.title: Oshi no Ko Season 2 Episode 1: Aqua's Dark Turn Shocks Viewers
anime_pulse_items.summary: The premiere of Oshi no Ko season 2 dives into the darker aspects of the entertainment industry. The episode's ending has fans theorizing about the next move. The show trends #1 on X in Japan.

anime_pulse_items.title: Dandadan Anime Adaptation Announced for October 2026
anime_pulse_items.summary: Science SARU reveals the anime adaptation of the hit manga Dandadan. The trailer showcases vibrant animation and quirky humor. Fans of the manga are ecstatic. The announcement trends globally on X.
